creator: jim@FreeBSD.org
text:
> What the Synopsis says.  This file hasn't been touched since 9th Jan
> of this year and hasn't been actually updated since December.
> 
> Fix
> 
>     A couple options:
> 
>         a) Pore over cvs stuff and update/maintain this page.
>         b) (more attractive) Nuke this file and the link to it from
>            the index page.

I vote for (b) -- if people are really interested in what's changed, the
CVS logs are available.  I for one, don't have time to keep this updated
or I'd choose (a) and volunteer to do it :-)

Opinions?

- jim
